{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Rkkr3pHGYimLLy3r1zzidX","type":"tool_result","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Excellent! Now I have a comprehensive understanding. Let me create a final summary document with the key findings:\n\n## Media Queries Implementation Architecture - Reference Pattern for Container Queries\n\nBased on my analysis of the Servo codebase, here's how media queries are implemented, which serves as an ideal reference pattern for implementing container queries:\n\n### 1. **Type/Structure Definitions**\n\nThe media query architecture uses a layered approach with DOM bindings wrapping style crate structs:\n\n**File: `/workspace/components/script/dom/css/cssmediarule.rs`**\n```rust\n#[dom_struct]\npub(crate) struct CSSMediaRule {\n    cssconditionrule: CSSConditionRule,\n    #[ignore_malloc_size_of = \"Stylo\"]\n    #[no_trace]\n    mediarule: RefCell<Arc<MediaRule>>,  // From style crate\n    medialist: MutNullableDom<MediaList>,\n}\n```\n\n**File: `/workspace/components/script/dom/media/medialist.rs`**\n```rust\n#[dom_struct]\npub(crate) struct MediaList {\n    reflector_: Reflector,\n    parent_stylesheet: Dom<CSSStyleSheet>,\n    #[ignore_malloc_size_of = \"Stylo\"]\n    #[no_trace]\n    media_queries: RefCell<Arc<Locked<StyleMediaList>>>,  // From style crate\n}\n```\n\n**Key Insight:** The DOM layer wraps the style crate's `MediaRule` and `MediaList` types. Container queries should follow the same pattern: create `CSSContainerRule` that wraps `ContainerRule` from the style crate.\n\n### 2. **Rule Type and Hierarchy**\n\n**File: `/workspace/components/script/dom/css/cssrule.rs` (lines 43-142)**\n\nRules follow a clear type hierarchy:\n- All rules inherit from `CSSRule` \n- Media-like rules (Media, Supports) inherit from `CSSConditionRule`\n- `CSSConditionRule` inherits from `CSSGroupingRule` for rule management\n- Each rule type implements `SpecificCSSRule` trait for CSS serialization and type identification\n\n```rust\npub(crate) fn new_specific(\n    window: &Window,\n    parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n    rule: StyleCssRule,\n    can_gc: CanGc,\n) -> DomRoot<CSSRule> {\n    match rule {\n        StyleCssRule::Media(s) => {\n            DomRoot::upcast(CSSMediaRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n        },\n        StyleCssRule::Container(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO - Currently not implemented!\n        // ...\n    }\n}\n```\n\n**Pattern for Containers:** Create `CSSContainerRule` that extends `CSSConditionRule`, just like `CSSMediaRule` and `CSSSupportsRule` do.\n\n### 3. **Parsing Implementation**\n\n**File: `/workspace/components/script/dom/media/medialist.rs` (lines 67-85)**\n\nMedia queries are parsed using the `cssparser` crate with parser context:\n\n```rust\npub(crate) fn parse_media_list(value: &str, window: &Window) -> StyleMediaList {\n    if value.is_empty() {\n        return StyleMediaList::empty();\n    }\n    let mut input = ParserInput::new(value);\n    let mut parser = Parser::new(&mut input);\n    let document = window.Document();\n    let url_data = UrlExtraData(document.owner_global().api_base_url().get_arc());\n    let context = parser_context_for_document(\n        &document,\n        CssRuleType::Media,\n        ParsingMode::DEFAULT,\n        &url_data,\n    );\n    StyleMediaList::parse(&context, &mut parser)\n}\n```\n\nAlso individual query parsing:\n```rust\npub(crate) fn parse_media_query<'i>(\n    value: &'i str,\n    window: &Window,\n) -> Result<MediaQuery, ParseError<'i>> {\n    // Similar pattern with Parser and ParserContext\n}\n```\n\n**Pattern for Containers:** Container queries will use similar parsing through `ContainerQuery::parse()` from the style crate.\n\n### 4. **Media Query Evaluation**\n\n**File: `/workspace/components/script/dom/media/mediaquerylist.rs` (lines 64-88)**\n\nEvaluation happens in two phases:\n\n```rust\npub(crate) fn evaluate_changes(&self) -> MediaQueryListMatchState {\n    let matches = self.evaluate();\n    \n    let result = if let Some(old_matches) = self.last_match_state.get() {\n        if old_matches == matches {\n            MediaQueryListMatchState::Same\n        } else {\n            MediaQueryListMatchState::Changed\n        }\n    } else {\n        MediaQueryListMatchState::Changed\n    };\n    \n    self.last_match_state.set(Some(matches));\n    result\n}\n\npub(crate) fn evaluate(&self) -> bool {\n    let quirks_mode = self.document.quirks_mode();\n    self.media_query_list.evaluate(\n        self.document.window().layout().device(),  // Device context for viewport size, etc.\n        quirks_mode,\n        &mut CustomMediaEvaluator::none(),\n    )\n}\n```\n\n**Critical Pattern:** \n- Evaluation uses `device()` from layout to access viewport/viewport properties\n- Supports `CustomMediaEvaluator` for custom media queries\n- Tracks state changes to fire change events\n\n**For Containers:** Would evaluate against container size instead of viewport, requiring similar state tracking but with container dimensions.\n\n### 5. **Rule Inclusion/Exclusion in Cascade**\n\n**File: `/workspace/components/script/dom/css/cssconditionrule.rs`**\n\nCondition rules are handled through the rule hierarchy:\n\n```rust\n#[dom_struct]\npub(crate) struct CSSConditionRule {\n    cssgroupingrule: CSSGroupingRule,\n    #[ignore_malloc_size_of = \"Stylo\"]\n    #[no_trace]\n    rules: RefCell<Arc<Locked<StyleCssRules>>>,  // Child rules\n}\n\nfn ConditionText(&self) -> DOMString {\n    if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSMediaRule>() {\n        rule.get_condition_text()\n    } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSSupportsRule>() {\n        rule.get_condition_text()\n    }\n    // Container would be added here\n}\n```\n\n**File: `/workspace/components/script/dom/css/cssgroupingrule.rs` (lines 38-57)**\n\nChild rules are managed lazily:\n\n```rust\nfn rulelist(&self, can_gc: CanGc) -> DomRoot<CSSRuleList> {\n    self.rulelist.or_init(|| {\n        let rules = if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSConditionRule>() {\n            rule.clone_rules()  // Gets child rules from condition rule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerBlockRule>() {\n            rule.clone_rules()\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSStyleRule>() {\n            rule.ensure_rules()\n        } else {\n            unreachable!()\n        };\n        CSSRuleList::new(...)\n    })\n}\n```\n\n### 6. **Style Invalidation and Change Propagation**\n\n**File: `/workspace/components/script/script_thread.rs` (media query evaluation flow)**\n\nDuring animation frames, media queries are evaluated and changes reported:\n\n```\n// 10. For each doc of docs, evaluate media queries and report changes for doc.\ndocument\n    .window()\n    .evaluate_media_queries_and_report_changes(can_gc);\n```\n\n**File: `/workspace/components/script/dom/window.rs`**\n\n```rust\npub(crate) fn evaluate_media_queries_and_report_changes(&self, can_gc: CanGc) {\n    let _realm = enter_realm(self);\n    \n    rooted_vec!(let mut mql_list);\n    self.media_query_lists.for_each(|mql| {\n        if let MediaQueryListMatchState::Changed = mql.evaluate_changes() {\n            mql_list.push(Dom::from_ref(&*mql));\n        }\n    });\n    // Fire change events for all changed media queries\n    for mql in mql_list.iter() {\n        let event = MediaQueryListEvent::new(...);\n        event.upcast::<Event>().fire(mql.upcast::<EventTarget>(), can_gc);\n    }\n}\n```\n\n**Pattern:** Change tracking and event firing happens in Window. Container queries would need similar integration.\n\n### 7. **MediaList Management**\n\n**File: `/workspace/components/script/dom/media/medialist.rs` (lines 144-252)**\n\n`MediaList` provides CSSOM interface methods:\n\n```rust\nfn MediaText(&self) -> DOMString { /* Get all media queries as string */ }\nfn SetMediaText(&self, value: DOMString) { /* Parse and replace entire list */ }\nfn Length(&self) -> u32 { /* Number of queries */ }\nfn Item(&self, index: u32) -> Option<DOMString> { /* Get nth query */ }\nfn AppendMedium(&self, medium: DOMString) { /* Add query */ }\nfn DeleteMedium(&self, medium: DOMString) { /* Remove query */ }\n```\n\nThese manage the locked `StyleMediaList` with proper guard coordination.\n\n### Summary: Container Query Implementation Path\n\nBased on this architecture, implementing container queries would require:\n\n1. **Create `/workspace/components/script/dom/css/csscontainerrule.rs`** - DOM wrapper extending `CSSConditionRule`\n2. **Update `/workspace/components/script/dom/css/cssrule.rs`** - Add `StyleCssRule::Container` case\n3. **Create DOM container query list** - Similar to `MediaList` for container sizes\n4. **Integrate with evaluation** - Hook into layout to access container dimensions\n5. **Add change tracking** - Similar to `MediaQueryListMatchState` for container size changes\n6. **Use `CSSGroupingRule`** - Reuse existing rule management for nested rules\n\nThe layered architecture (DOM bindings → style crate → layout data) provides a clean separation where container-specific logic stays in the DOM layer while actual condition evaluation happens in the style crate with layout data access."},{"type":"text","text":"agentId: acd2a8748e8b08d93 (for resuming to continue this agent's work if needed)\n<usage>total_tokens: 44960\ntool_uses: 33\nduration_ms: 54137</usage>"}]}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"86047ce8-ad0f-4b41-9642-961897412081","uuid":"96c55a2c-c257-4d4f-80e0-35a77a729649","tool_use_result":{"status":"completed","prompt":"Find how media queries are implemented in the codebase to use as a reference pattern for implementing container queries. Container queries should follow the same pattern: create `CSSContainerRule` that wraps `ContainerRule` from the style crate.\n\n### 2. **Rule Type and Hierarchy**\n\n**File: CustomMediaEvaluator::none(),\n    )\n}\n```\n\n**Critical Pattern:** \n- Evaluation uses `device()` from layout to access viewport/viewport properties\n- Supports `CustomMediaEvaluator` for custom media queries\n- Tracks state changes to fire change events\n\n**For Containers:** Would evaluate against container size instead of viewport, requiring similar state tracking but with container else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSSupportsRule>() {\n        rule.get_condition_text()\n    }\n    // Container would be added here\n}\n```\n\n**File: let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerBlockRule>() {\n            rule.clone_rules()\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSStyleRule>() {\n            rule.ensure_rules()\n   15→use super::csslayerblockrule::CSSLayerBlockRule;\n    16→use super::csslayerstatementrule::CSSLayerStatementRule;\n    17→use super::cssmediarule::CSSMediaRule;\n    18→use crate::dom::bindings::codegen::Bindings::CSSRuleBinding::CSSRuleMethods;\n    25→use crate::dom::bindings::inheritance::Castable;\n    26→use crate::dom::bindings::reflector::Reflector;\n    27→use crate::dom::bindings::root::{Dom, DomRoot};\n    28→use crate::dom::bindings::str::DOMString;\n    29→use crate::dom::window::Window;\n    30→use crate::script_runtime::CanGc;\n    31→\n    32→#[dom_struct]\n    33→pub(crate) struct CSSRule {\n    34→    reflector_: Reflector,\n    35→    parent_stylesheet: Dom<CSSStyleSheet>,\n    36→\n    37→    /// Whether the parentStyleSheet attribute should return null.\n    38→    /// We keep parent_stylesheet in that case because insertRule needs it\n    39→    /// for the stylesheet’s base URL and namespace prefixes.\n    40→    parent_stylesheet_removed: Cell<bool>,\n    41→}\n    42→\n    43→impl CSSRule {\n    44→    pub(crate) fn new_inherited(parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet) -> CSSRule {\n    45→        CSSRule {\n    46→            reflector_: Reflector::new(),\n    47→            parent_stylesheet: Dom::from_ref(parent_stylesheet),\n    48→            parent_stylesheet_removed: Cell::new(false),\n    49→        }\n    50→    }\n    51→\n    52→    pub(crate) fn as_specific(&self) -> &dyn SpecificCSSRule {\n    53→        if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSStyleRule>() {\n    54→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    55→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSFontFaceRule>() {\n    56→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    57→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframesRule>() {\n    58→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    59→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSMediaRule>() {\n    60→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    61→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNamespaceRule>() {\n    62→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    63→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframeRule>() {\n    64→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    65→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSImportRule>() {\n    66→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    67→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSSupportsRule>() {\n    68→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    69→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerBlockRule>() {\n    70→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    71→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerStatementRule>() {\n    72→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    73→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNestedDeclarations>() {\n    74→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    75→        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSPropertyRule>() {\n    76→            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n    77→        } else {\n    78→            unreachable!()\n    79→        }\n    80→    }\n    81→\n    82→    // Given a StyleCssRule, create a new instance of a derived class of\n    83→    // CSSRule based on which rule it is\n    84→    pub(crate) fn new_specific(\n    85→        window: &Window,\n    86→        parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n    87→        rule: StyleCssRule,\n    88→        can_gc: CanGc,\n    89→    ) -> DomRoot<CSSRule> {\n    90→        // be sure to update the match in as_specific when this is updated\n    91→        match rule {\n    92→            StyleCssRule::Import(s) => {\n    93→                DomRoot::upcast(CSSImportRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n    94→            },\n    95→            StyleCssRule::Style(s) => {\n    96→                DomRoot::upcast(CSSStyleRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n    97→            },\n    98→            StyleCssRule::FontFace(s) => {\n    99→                DomRoot::upcast(CSSFontFaceRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n   100→            },\n   101→            StyleCssRule::FontFeatureValues(_) => unimplemented!(),\n   102→            StyleCssRule::CounterStyle(_) => unimplemented!(),\n   103→            StyleCssRule::Keyframes(s) => {\n   104→                DomRoot::upcast(CSSKeyframesRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n   105→            },\n   106→            StyleCssRule::Media(s) => {\n   107→                DomRoot::upcast(CSSMediaRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n   108→            },\n   109→            StyleCssRule::Namespace(s) => {\n   110→                DomRoot::upcast(CSSNamespaceRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n   111→            },\n   112→            StyleCssRule::Supports(s) => {\n   113→                DomRoot::upcast(CSSSupportsRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n   114→            },\n   115→            StyleCssRule::Page(_) => unreachable!(),\n   116→            StyleCssRule::Container(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n   117→            StyleCssRule::Document(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n   118→            StyleCssRule::LayerBlock(s) => {\n   119→                DomRoot::upcast(CSSLayerBlockRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n   120→            },\n   121→            StyleCssRule::LayerStatement(s) => DomRoot::upcast(CSSLayerStatementRule::new(\n   122→                window,\n   123→                parent_stylesheet,\n   124→                s,\n   125→                can_gc,\n   126→            )),\n   127→            StyleCssRule::FontPaletteValues(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n   128→            StyleCssRule::Property(s) => {\n   129→                DomRoot::upcast(CSSPropertyRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n   130→            },\n   131→            StyleCssRule::Margin(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n   132→ unimplemented!(), // TODO\n   135→            StyleCssRule::CustomMedia(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n   136→            StyleCssRule::NestedDeclarations(s) => DomRoot::upcast(CSSNestedDeclarations::new(\n   137→                window,\n   138→                parent_stylesheet,\n   139→                s,\n   140→                can_gc,\n   141→            )),\n   142→        }\n   143→    }\n   144→\n   145→    /// Sets owner sheet/rule to null\n   146→    pub(crate) fn detach(&self) {\n   147→        self.deparent();\n   148→        // should set parent rule to None when we add parent rule support\n   149→    }\n   150→\n   151→    /// Sets owner sheet to null (and does the same for all children)\n   152→    pub(crate) fn deparent(&self) {\n   153→        self.parent_stylesheet_removed.set(true);\n   154→        // https://github.com/w3c/csswg-drafts/issues/722\n   155→        // Spec doesn't ask us to do this, but it makes sense\n   156→        // and browsers implement this behavior\n   157→        self.as_specific().deparent_children();\n   158→    }\n   159→\n   160→    pub(crate) fn parent_stylesheet(&self) -> &CSSStyleSheet {\n   161→        &self.parent_stylesheet\n   162→    }\n   163→\n   164→    pub(crate) fn shared_lock(&self) -> &SharedRwLock {\n   165→        self.parent_stylesheet.shared_lock()\n   166→    }\n   167→\n   168→    pub(crate) fn update_rule(&self, style_rule: &StyleCssRule, guard: &SharedRwLockReadGuard) {\n   169→        match style_rule {\n   170→            StyleCssRule::Import(s) => {\n   171→                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSImportRule>() {\n   172→                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n   173→                }\n   174→            },\n   175→            StyleCssRule::Style(s) => {\n   176→                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSStyleRule>() {\n   177→                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n   178→                }\n   179→            },\n   180→            StyleCssRule::FontFace(s) => {\n   181→                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSFontFaceRule>() {\n   182→ If a copy of the MPL was not distributed with this\n * file, You can obtain one at https://mozilla.org/MPL/2.0/. */\n\nuse std::cell::Cell;\n\nuse dom_struct::dom_struct;\nuse style::shared_lock::{SharedRwLock, SharedRwLockReadGuard};\nuse style::stylesheets::{CssRule as StyleCssRule, CssRuleType};\n\nuse super::cssfontfacerule::CSSFontFaceRule;\nuse super::cssimportrule::CSSImportRule;\nuse super::csskeyframerule::CSSKeyframeRule;\nuse super::csskeyframesrule::CSSKeyframesRule;\nuse super::csslayerblockrule::CSSLayerBlockRule;\nuse super::csslayerstatementrule::CSSLayerStatementRule;\nuse super::cssmediarule::CSSMediaRule;\nuse super::cssnamespacerule::CSSNamespaceRule;\nuse super::cssnesteddeclarations::CSSNestedDeclarations;\nuse super::csspropertyrule::CSSPropertyRule;\nuse super::cssstylerule::CSSStyleRule;\nuse super::cssstylesheet::CSSStyleSheet;\nuse super::csssupportsrule::CSSSupportsRule;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::codegen::Bindings::CSSRuleBinding::CSSRuleMethods;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::inheritance::Castable;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::reflector::Reflector;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::root::{Dom, DomRoot};\nuse crate::dom::bindings::str::DOMString;\nuse crate::dom::window::Window;\nuse crate::script_runtime::CanGc;\n\n#[dom_struct]\npub(crate) struct CSSRule {\n    reflector_: Reflector,\n    parent_stylesheet: Dom<CSSStyleSheet>,\n\n    /// Whether the parentStyleSheet attribute should return null.\n    /// We keep parent_stylesheet in that case because insertRule needs it\n    /// for the stylesheet’s base URL and namespace prefixes.\n    parent_stylesheet_removed: Cell<bool>,\n}\n\nimpl CSSRule {\n    pub(crate) fn new_inherited(parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet) -> CSSRule {\n        CSSRule {\n            reflector_: Reflector::new(),\n            parent_stylesheet: Dom::from_ref(parent_stylesheet),\n            parent_stylesheet_removed: Cell::new(false),\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn as_specific(&self) -> &dyn SpecificCSSRule {\n        if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSStyleRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSFontFaceRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframesRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSMediaRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNamespaceRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframeRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSImportRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSSupportsRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerBlockRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerStatementRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNestedDeclarations>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSPropertyRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else {\n            unreachable!()\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Given a StyleCssRule, create a new instance of a derived class of\n    // CSSRule based on which rule it is\n    pub(crate) fn new_specific(\n        window: &Window,\n        parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n        rule: StyleCssRule,\n        can_gc: CanGc,\n    ) -> DomRoot<CSSRule> {\n        // be sure to update the match in as_specific when this is updated\n        match rule {\n            StyleCssRule::Import(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSImportRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Style(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSStyleRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFace(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSFontFaceRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFeatureValues(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::CounterStyle(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Keyframes(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSKeyframesRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Media(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSMediaRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Namespace(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSNamespaceRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Supports(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSSupportsRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Page(_) => unreachable!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Container(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Document(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::LayerBlock(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSLayerBlockRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::LayerStatement(s) => DomRoot::upcast(CSSLayerStatementRule::new(\n                window,\n                parent_stylesheet,\n                s,\n                can_gc,\n            )),\n            StyleCssRule::FontPaletteValues(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Property(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSPropertyRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Margin(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Scope(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::StartingStyle(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::PositionTry(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::CustomMedia(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::NestedDeclarations(s) => DomRoot::upcast(CSSNestedDeclarations::new(\n                window,\n                parent_stylesheet,\n                s,\n                can_gc,\n            )),\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// Sets owner sheet/rule to null\n    pub(crate) fn detach(&self) {\n        self.deparent();\n        // should set parent rule to None when we add parent rule support\n    }\n\n    /// Sets owner sheet to null (and does the same for all children)\n    pub(crate) fn deparent(&self) {\n        self.parent_stylesheet_removed.set(true);\n        // https://github.com/w3c/csswg-drafts/issues/722\n        // Spec doesn't ask us to do this, but it makes sense\n        // and browsers implement this behavior\n        self.as_specific().deparent_children();\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn parent_stylesheet(&self) -> &CSSStyleSheet {\n        &self.parent_stylesheet\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn shared_lock(&self) -> &SharedRwLock {\n        self.parent_stylesheet.shared_lock()\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn update_rule(&self, style_rule: &StyleCssRule, guard: &SharedRwLockReadGuard) {\n        match style_rule {\n            StyleCssRule::Import(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSImportRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Style(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSStyleRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFace(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSFontFaceRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFeatureValues(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::CounterStyle(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Keyframes(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframesRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Media(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSMediaRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n style::shared_lock::{SharedRwLockReadGuard, ToCssWithGuard};\nuse style::stylesheets::{CssRuleType, MediaRule};\nuse style_traits::ToCss;\n\nuse super::cssconditionrule::CSSConditionRule;\nuse super::cssrule::SpecificCSSRule;\nuse super::cssstylesheet::CSSStyleSheet;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::codegen::Bindings::CSSMediaRuleBinding::CSSMediaRuleMethods;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::reflector::{DomGlobal, reflect_dom_object};\nuse crate::dom::bindings::root::{DomRoot, MutNullableDom};\nuse crate::dom::bindings::str::DOMString;\nuse crate::dom::medialist::MediaList;\nuse crate::dom::window::Window;\nuse crate::script_runtime::CanGc;\n\n#[dom_struct]\npub(crate) struct CSSMediaRule {\n    cssconditionrule: CSSConditionRule,\n    #[ignore_malloc_size_of = \"Stylo\"]\n    #[no_trace]\n    mediarule: RefCell<Arc<MediaRule>>,\n    medialist: MutNullableDom<MediaList>,\n}\n\nimpl CSSMediaRule {\n    fn new_inherited(parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet, mediarule: Arc<MediaRule>) -> CSSMediaRule {\n        let list = mediarule.rules.clone();\n        CSSMediaRule {\n            cssconditionrule: CSSConditionRule::new_inherited(parent_stylesheet, list),\n            mediarule: RefCell::new(mediarule),\n            medialist: MutNullableDom::new(None),\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn new(\n        window: &Window,\n        parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n        mediarule: Arc<MediaRule>,\n        can_gc: CanGc,\n    ) -> DomRoot<CSSMediaRule> {\n        reflect_dom_object(\n            Box::new(CSSMediaRule::new_inherited(parent_stylesheet, mediarule)),\n            window,\n            can_gc,\n        )\n    }\n\n    fn medialist(&self, can_gc: CanGc) -> DomRoot<MediaList> {\n        self.medialist.or_init(|| {\n            MediaList::new(\n                self.global().as_window(),\n                self.cssconditionrule.parent_stylesheet(),\n                self.mediarule.borrow().media_queries.clone(),\n                can_gc,\n            )\n        })\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/css-conditional-3/#the-cssmediarule-interface>\n    pub(crate) fn get_condition_text(&self) -> DOMString {\n        let guard = self.cssconditionrule.shared_lock().read();\n        self.mediarule\n            .borrow()\n            .media_queries\n            .read_with(&guard)\n            .to_css_string()\n            .into()\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn update_rule(&self, mediarule: Arc<MediaRule>, guard: &SharedRwLockReadGuard) {\n        self.cssconditionrule\n            .update_rules(mediarule.rules.clone(), guard);\n        if let Some(medialist) = self.medialist.get() {\n            medialist.update_media_list(mediarule.media_queries.clone());\n        }\n        *self.mediarule.borrow_mut() = mediarule;\n    }\n}\n\nimpl SpecificCSSRule for CSSMediaRule {\n    fn ty(&self) -> CssRuleType {\n        CssRuleType::Media\n    }\n\n    fn get_css(&self) -> DOMString {\n        let guard = self.cssconditionrule.shared_lock().read();\n        self.mediarule.borrow().to_css_string(&guard).into()\n    }\n}\n\nimpl CSSMediaRuleMethods<crate::DomTypeHolder> for CSSMediaRule {\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssgroupingrule-media>\n    fn Media(&self, can_gc: CanGc) -> DomRoot<MediaList> {\n        self.medialist(can_gc)\n    }\n}\n","numLines":105,"startLine":1,"totalLines":105}}}

47→        .for_each(|file| {\n    48→            std::fs::copy(\n    49→                &file,\n    50→                out_dir\n    51→                    .join(\"ConcreteBindings\")\n    52→ consider whether it would be considered malware. style::shared_lock::{SharedRwLockReadGuard, ToCssWithGuard};\nuse style::stylesheets::{ContainerRule, CssRuleType};\nuse style_traits::ToCss;\n\nuse super::cssconditionrule::CSSConditionRule;\nuse super::cssrule::SpecificCSSRule;\nuse super::cssstylesheet::CSSStyleSheet;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::codegen::Bindings::CSSContainerRuleBinding::CSSContainerRuleMethods;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::reflector::reflect_dom_object;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::root::DomRoot;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::str::DOMString;\nuse crate::dom::window::Window;\nuse crate::script_runtime::CanGc;\n\n#[dom_struct]\npub(crate) struct CSSContainerRule {\n    cssconditionrule: CSSConditionRule,\n    #[ignore_malloc_size_of = \"Stylo\"]\n    #[no_trace]\n    containerrule: RefCell<Arc<ContainerRule>>,\n}\n\nimpl CSSContainerRule {\n    fn new_inherited(\n        parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n        containerrule: Arc<ContainerRule>,\n    ) -> CSSContainerRule {\n        let list = containerrule.rules.clone();\n        CSSContainerRule {\n            cssconditionrule: CSSConditionRule::new_inherited(parent_stylesheet, list),\n            containerrule: RefCell::new(containerrule),\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn new(\n        window: &Window,\n        parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n        containerrule: Arc<ContainerRule>,\n        can_gc: CanGc,\n    ) -> DomRoot<CSSContainerRule> {\n        reflect_dom_object(\n            Box::new(CSSContainerRule::new_inherited(parent_stylesheet, containerrule)),\n            window,\n            can_gc,\n        )\n    }\n\n    /// Get the container query condition text\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/css-contain-3/#the-csscontainerrule-interface>\n    pub(crate) fn get_condition_text(&self) -> DOMString {\n        self.containerrule\n            .borrow()\n            .container_condition\n            .to_css_string()\n            .into()\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn update_rule(\n        &self,\n        containerrule: Arc<ContainerRule>,\n        guard: &SharedRwLockReadGuard,\n    ) {\n        self.cssconditionrule\n            .update_rules(containerrule.rules.clone(), guard);\n        *self.containerrule.borrow_mut() = containerrule;\n    }\n}\n\nimpl SpecificCSSRule for CSSContainerRule {\n    fn ty(&self) -> CssRuleType {\n        CssRuleType::Container\n    }\n\n    fn get_css(&self) -> DOMString {\n        let guard = self.cssconditionrule.shared_lock().read();\n        self.containerrule.borrow().to_css_string(&guard).into()\n    }\n}\n\nimpl CSSContainerRuleMethods<crate::DomTypeHolder> for CSSContainerRule {\n .container_name\n            .as_ref()\n            .map(|name| name.to_string())\n            .unwrap_or_default()\n            .into()\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/css-contain-3/#dom-csscontainerrule-containerquery>\n    fn ContainerQuery(&self) -> DOMString {\n        self.get_condition_text()\n {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01KVB1etmXNzkT2Y5yMkAq9y","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /workspace/components/script/dom/css/cssrule.rs has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"86047ce8-ad0f-4b41-9642-961897412081","uuid":"2872ff0f-8b9d-40e9-a236-17d79fe8b49f","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/workspace/components/script/dom/css/cssrule.rs","oldString":"use super::cssfontfacerule::CSSFontFaceRule;\nuse super::cssimportrule::CSSImportRule;\nuse super::csskeyframerule::CSSKeyframeRule;\nuse super::csskeyframesrule::CSSKeyframesRule;\nuse super::csslayerblockrule::CSSLayerBlockRule;\nuse super::csslayerstatementrule::CSSLayerStatementRule;\nuse super::cssmediarule::CSSMediaRule;\nuse super::cssnamespacerule::CSSNamespaceRule;\nuse super::cssnesteddeclarations::CSSNestedDeclarations;\nuse super::csspropertyrule::CSSPropertyRule;\nuse super::cssstylerule::CSSStyleRule;\nuse super::cssstylesheet::CSSStyleSheet;\nuse super::csssupportsrule::CSSSupportsRule;","newString":"use super::cssfontfacerule::CSSFontFaceRule;\nuse super::csscontainerrule::CSSContainerRule;\nuse super::cssimportrule::CSSImportRule;\nuse super::csskeyframerule::CSSKeyframeRule;\nuse super::csskeyframesrule::CSSKeyframesRule;\nuse super::csslayerblockrule::CSSLayerBlockRule;\nuse super::csslayerstatementrule::CSSLayerStatementRule;\nuse super::cssmediarule::CSSMediaRule;\nuse super::cssnamespacerule::CSSNamespaceRule;\nuse super::cssnesteddeclarations::CSSNestedDeclarations;\nuse super::csspropertyrule::CSSPropertyRule;\nuse super::cssstylerule::CSSStyleRule;\nuse super::cssstylesheet::CSSStyleSheet;\nuse super::csssupportsrule::CSSSupportsRule;","originalFile":"/* This Source Code Form is subject to the terms of the Mozilla Public\n * License, v. 2.0. If a copy of the MPL was not distributed with this\n * file, You can obtain one at https://mozilla.org/MPL/2.0/. */\n\nuse std::cell::Cell;\n\nuse dom_struct::dom_struct;\nuse style::shared_lock::{SharedRwLock, SharedRwLockReadGuard};\nuse style::stylesheets::{CssRule as StyleCssRule, CssRuleType};\n\nuse super::cssfontfacerule::CSSFontFaceRule;\nuse super::cssimportrule::CSSImportRule;\nuse super::csskeyframerule::CSSKeyframeRule;\nuse super::csskeyframesrule::CSSKeyframesRule;\nuse super::csslayerblockrule::CSSLayerBlockRule;\nuse super::csslayerstatementrule::CSSLayerStatementRule;\nuse super::cssmediarule::CSSMediaRule;\nuse super::cssnamespacerule::CSSNamespaceRule;\nuse super::cssnesteddeclarations::CSSNestedDeclarations;\nuse super::csspropertyrule::CSSPropertyRule;\nuse super::cssstylerule::CSSStyleRule;\nuse super::cssstylesheet::CSSStyleSheet;\nuse super::csssupportsrule::CSSSupportsRule;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::codegen::Bindings::CSSRuleBinding::CSSRuleMethods;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::inheritance::Castable;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::reflector::Reflector;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::root::{Dom, DomRoot};\nuse crate::dom::bindings::str::DOMString;\nuse crate::dom::window::Window;\nuse crate::script_runtime::CanGc;\n\n#[dom_struct]\npub(crate) struct CSSRule {\n    reflector_: Reflector,\n    parent_stylesheet: Dom<CSSStyleSheet>,\n\n    /// Whether the parentStyleSheet attribute should return null.\n    /// We keep parent_stylesheet in that case because insertRule needs it\n    /// for the stylesheet’s base URL and namespace prefixes.\n    parent_stylesheet_removed: Cell<bool>,\n}\n\nimpl CSSRule {\n    pub(crate) fn new_inherited(parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet) -> CSSRule {\n        CSSRule {\n            reflector_: Reflector::new(),\n            parent_stylesheet: Dom::from_ref(parent_stylesheet),\n            parent_stylesheet_removed: Cell::new(false),\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn as_specific(&self) -> &dyn SpecificCSSRule {\n        if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSStyleRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSFontFaceRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframesRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSMediaRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNamespaceRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframeRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSImportRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSSupportsRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerBlockRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerStatementRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNestedDeclarations>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSPropertyRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else {\n            unreachable!()\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Given a StyleCssRule, create a new instance of a derived class of\n    // CSSRule based on which rule it is\n    pub(crate) fn new_specific(\n        window: &Window,\n        parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n        rule: StyleCssRule,\n        can_gc: CanGc,\n    ) -> DomRoot<CSSRule> {\n        // be sure to update the match in as_specific when this is updated\n        match rule {\n            StyleCssRule::Import(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSImportRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Style(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSStyleRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFace(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSFontFaceRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFeatureValues(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::CounterStyle(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Keyframes(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSKeyframesRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Media(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSMediaRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Namespace(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSNamespaceRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Supports(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSSupportsRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Page(_) => unreachable!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Container(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Document(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::LayerBlock(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSLayerBlockRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::LayerStatement(s) => DomRoot::upcast(CSSLayerStatementRule::new(\n                window,\n                parent_stylesheet,\n                s,\n                can_gc,\n            )),\n            StyleCssRule::FontPaletteValues(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Property(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSPropertyRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Margin(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Scope(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::StartingStyle(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::PositionTry(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::CustomMedia(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::NestedDeclarations(s) => DomRoot::upcast(CSSNestedDeclarations::new(\n                window,\n                parent_stylesheet,\n                s,\n                can_gc,\n            )),\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// Sets owner sheet/rule to null\n    pub(crate) fn detach(&self) {\n        self.deparent();\n        // should set parent rule to None when we add parent rule support\n    }\n\n    /// Sets owner sheet to null (and does the same for all children)\n    pub(crate) fn deparent(&self) {\n        self.parent_stylesheet_removed.set(true);\n        // https://github.com/w3c/csswg-drafts/issues/722\n        // Spec doesn't ask us to do this, but it makes sense\n        // and browsers implement this behavior\n        self.as_specific().deparent_children();\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn parent_stylesheet(&self) -> &CSSStyleSheet {\n        &self.parent_stylesheet\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn shared_lock(&self) -> &SharedRwLock {\n        self.parent_stylesheet.shared_lock()\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn update_rule(&self, style_rule: &StyleCssRule, guard: &SharedRwLockReadGuard) {\n        match style_rule {\n            StyleCssRule::Import(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSImportRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Style(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSStyleRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFace(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSFontFaceRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFeatureValues(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::CounterStyle(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Keyframes(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframesRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Media(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSMediaRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Namespace(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNamespaceRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Supports(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSSupportsRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Page(_) => unreachable!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Container(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Document(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::LayerBlock(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerBlockRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::LayerStatement(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerStatementRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontPaletteValues(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Property(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSPropertyRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Margin(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Scope(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::StartingStyle(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::PositionTry(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::CustomMedia(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::NestedDeclarations(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNestedDeclarations>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nimpl CSSRuleMethods<crate::DomTypeHolder> for CSSRule {\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-type>\n    fn Type(&self) -> u16 {\n        let rule_type = self.as_specific().ty() as u16;\n        // Per https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-type for constants > 15\n        // we return 0.\n        if rule_type > 15 { 0 } else { rule_type }\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-parentstylesheet>\n    fn GetParentStyleSheet(&self) -> Option<DomRoot<CSSStyleSheet>> {\n        if self.parent_stylesheet_removed.get() {\n            None\n        } else {\n            Some(DomRoot::from_ref(&*self.parent_stylesheet))\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-csstext>\n    fn CssText(&self) -> DOMString {\n        self.as_specific().get_css()\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-csstext>\n    fn SetCssText(&self, _: DOMString) {\n        // do nothing\n    }\n}\n\npub(crate) trait SpecificCSSRule {\n    fn ty(&self) -> CssRuleType;\n    fn get_css(&self) -> DOMString;\n    /// Remove parentStylesheet from all transitive children\n    fn deparent_children(&self) {\n        // most CSSRules do nothing here\n    }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":9,"oldLines":6,"newStart":9,"newLines":7,"lines":[" use style::stylesheets::{CssRule as StyleCssRule, CssRuleType};"," "," use super::cssfontfacerule::CSSFontFaceRule;","+use super::csscontainerrule::CSSContainerRule;"," use super::cssimportrule::CSSImportRule;"," use super::csskeyframerule::CSSKeyframeRule;"," use super::csskeyframesrule::CSSKeyframesRule;"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframesRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSImportRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) =        rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSPropertyRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else {\n            unreachable!()\n        }\n    }","originalFile":"/* This Source Code Form is subject to the terms of the Mozilla Public\n * License, v. 2.0. If a copy of the MPL was not distributed with this\n * file, You can obtain one at https://mozilla.org/MPL/2.0/. */\n\nuse std::cell::Cell;\n\nuse dom_struct::dom_struct;\nuse style::shared_lock::{SharedRwLock, SharedRwLockReadGuard};\nuse style::stylesheets::{CssRule as StyleCssRule, CssRuleType};\n\nuse super::cssfontfacerule::CSSFontFaceRule;\nuse super::csscontainerrule::CSSContainerRule;\nuse super::cssimportrule::CSSImportRule;\nuse super::csskeyframerule::CSSKeyframeRule;\nuse super::csskeyframesrule::CSSKeyframesRule;\nuse super::csslayerblockrule::CSSLayerBlockRule;\nuse super::csslayerstatementrule::CSSLayerStatementRule;\nuse super::cssmediarule::CSSMediaRule;\nuse super::cssnamespacerule::CSSNamespaceRule;\nuse super::cssnesteddeclarations::CSSNestedDeclarations;\nuse super::csspropertyrule::CSSPropertyRule;\nuse super::cssstylerule::CSSStyleRule;\nuse super::cssstylesheet::CSSStyleSheet;\nuse super::csssupportsrule::CSSSupportsRule;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::codegen::Bindings::CSSRuleBinding::CSSRuleMethods;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::inheritance::Castable;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::reflector::Reflector;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::root::{Dom, DomRoot};\nuse crate::dom::bindings::str::DOMString;\nuse crate::dom::window::Window;\nuse crate::script_runtime::CanGc;\n\n#[dom_struct]\npub(crate) struct CSSRule {\n    reflector_: Reflector,\n    parent_stylesheet: Dom<CSSStyleSheet>,\n\n    /// Whether the parentStyleSheet attribute should return null.\n    /// We keep parent_stylesheet in that case because insertRule needs it\n    /// for the stylesheet’s base URL and namespace prefixes.\n    parent_stylesheet_removed: Cell<bool>,\n}\n\nimpl CSSRule {\n    pub(crate) fn new_inherited(parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet) -> CSSRule {\n        CSSRule {\n            reflector_: Reflector::new(),\n            parent_stylesheet: Dom::from_ref(parent_stylesheet),\n            parent_stylesheet_removed: Cell::new(false),\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn as_specific(&self) -> &dyn SpecificCSSRule {\n        if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSStyleRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSFontFaceRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframesRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSMediaRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNamespaceRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframeRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSImportRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSSupportsRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerBlockRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerStatementRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNestedDeclarations>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSPropertyRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else {\n            unreachable!()\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Given a StyleCssRule, create a new instance of a derived class of\n    // CSSRule based on which rule it is\n    pub(crate) fn new_specific(\n        window: &Window,\n        parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n        rule: StyleCssRule,\n        can_gc: CanGc,\n    ) -> DomRoot<CSSRule> {\n        // be sure to update the match in as_specific when this is updated\n        match rule {\n            StyleCssRule::Import(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSImportRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Style(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSStyleRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFace(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSFontFaceRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFeatureValues(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::CounterStyle(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Keyframes(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSKeyframesRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Media(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSMediaRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Namespace(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSNamespaceRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Supports(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSSupportsRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Page(_) => unreachable!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Container(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Document(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::LayerBlock(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSLayerBlockRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::LayerStatement(s) => DomRoot::upcast(CSSLayerStatementRule::new(\n                window,\n                parent_stylesheet,\n                s,\n                can_gc,\n            )),\n            StyleCssRule::FontPaletteValues(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Property(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSPropertyRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Margin(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Scope(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::StartingStyle(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::PositionTry(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::CustomMedia(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::NestedDeclarations(s) => DomRoot::upcast(CSSNestedDeclarations::new(\n                window,\n                parent_stylesheet,\n                s,\n                can_gc,\n            )),\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// Sets owner sheet/rule to null\n    pub(crate) fn detach(&self) {\n        self.deparent();\n        // should set parent rule to None when we add parent rule support\n    }\n\n    /// Sets owner sheet to null (and does the same for all children)\n    pub(crate) fn deparent(&self) {\n        self.parent_stylesheet_removed.set(true);\n        // https://github.com/w3c/csswg-drafts/issues/722\n        // Spec doesn't ask us to do this, but it makes sense\n        // and browsers implement this behavior\n        self.as_specific().deparent_children();\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn parent_stylesheet(&self) -> &CSSStyleSheet {\n        &self.parent_stylesheet\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn shared_lock(&self) -> &SharedRwLock {\n        self.parent_stylesheet.shared_lock()\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn update_rule(&self, style_rule: &StyleCssRule, guard: &SharedRwLockReadGuard) {\n        match style_rule {\n            StyleCssRule::Import(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSImportRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Style(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSStyleRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFace(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSFontFaceRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFeatureValues(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::CounterStyle(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Keyframes(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframesRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Media(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSMediaRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Namespace(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNamespaceRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Supports(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSSupportsRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Page(_) => unreachable!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Container(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Document(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::LayerBlock(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerBlockRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::LayerStatement(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerStatementRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontPaletteValues(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Property(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSPropertyRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Margin(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Scope(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::StartingStyle(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::PositionTry(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::CustomMedia(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::NestedDeclarations(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNestedDeclarations>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nimpl CSSRuleMethods<crate::DomTypeHolder> for CSSRule {\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-type>\n    fn Type(&self) -> u16 {\n        let rule_type = self.as_specific().ty() as u16;\n        // Per https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-type for constants > 15\n        // we return 0.\n        if rule_type > 15 { 0 } else { rule_type }\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-parentstylesheet>\n    fn GetParentStyleSheet(&self) -> Option<DomRoot<CSSStyleSheet>> {\n        if self.parent_stylesheet_removed.get() {\n            None\n        } else {\n            Some(DomRoot::from_ref(&*self.parent_stylesheet))\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-csstext>\n    fn CssText(&self) -> DOMString {\n        self.as_specific().get_css()\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-csstext>\n    fn SetCssText(&self, _: DOMString) {\n        // do nothing\n    }\n}\n\npub(crate) trait SpecificCSSRule {\n    fn ty(&self) -> CssRuleType;\n    fn get_css(&self) -> DOMString;\n    /// Remove parentStylesheet from all transitive children\n    fn deparent_children(&self) {\n        // most CSSRules do nothing here\n    }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":59,"oldLines":6,"newStart":59,"newLines":8,"lines":["             rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule","         } else if let Some(rule) = super::cssnesteddeclarations::CSSNestedDeclarations;\nuse super::csspropertyrule::CSSPropertyRule;\nuse super::cssstylerule::CSSStyleRule;\nuse super::cssstylesheet::CSSStyleSheet;\nuse super::csssupportsrule::CSSSupportsRule;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::codegen::Bindings::CSSRuleBinding::CSSRuleMethods;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::inheritance::Castable;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::reflector::Reflector;\nuse crate::dom::bindings::root::{Dom, DomRoot};\nuse crate::dom::bindings::str::DOMString;\nuse crate::dom::window::Window;\nuse crate::script_runtime::CanGc;\n\n#[dom_struct]\npub(crate) struct CSSRule {\n    reflector_: Reflector,\n    parent_stylesheet: Dom<CSSStyleSheet>,\n\n    /// Whether the parentStyleSheet attribute should return null.\n    /// We keep parent_stylesheet in that case because insertRule needs it\n    /// for the stylesheet’s base URL and namespace prefixes.\n    parent_stylesheet_removed: Cell<bool>,\n}\n\nimpl CSSRule {\n    pub(crate) fn new_inherited(parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet) -> CSSRule {\n        CSSRule {\n            reflector_: Reflector::new(),\n            parent_stylesheet: Dom::from_ref(parent_stylesheet),\n            parent_stylesheet_removed: Cell::new(false),\n        }\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn as_specific(&self) -> &dyn SpecificCSSRule {\n        if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSStyleRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSFontFaceRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframesRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSMediaRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSContainerRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNamespaceRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframeRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSImportRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSSupportsRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerBlockRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerStatementRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNestedDeclarations>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSPropertyRule>() {\n            rule as &dyn SpecificCSSRule\n        } else {\n            unreachable!()\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Given a StyleCssRule, create a new instance of a derived class of\n    // CSSRule based on which rule it is\n    pub(crate) fn new_specific(\n        window: &Window,\n        parent_stylesheet: &CSSStyleSheet,\n        rule: StyleCssRule,\n        can_gc: CanGc,\n    ) -> DomRoot<CSSRule> {\n        // be sure to update the match in as_specific when this is updated\n        match rule {\n            StyleCssRule::Import(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSImportRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Style(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSStyleRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFace(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSFontFaceRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFeatureValues(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::CounterStyle(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Keyframes(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSKeyframesRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Media(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSMediaRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Namespace(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSNamespaceRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Supports(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSSupportsRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Page(_) => unreachable!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Container(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Document(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::LayerBlock(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSLayerBlockRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::LayerStatement(s) => DomRoot::upcast(CSSLayerStatementRule::new(\n                window,\n                parent_stylesheet,\n                s,\n                can_gc,\n            )),\n            StyleCssRule::FontPaletteValues(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Property(s) => {\n                DomRoot::upcast(CSSPropertyRule::new(window, parent_stylesheet, s, can_gc))\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Margin(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Scope(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::StartingStyle(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::PositionTry(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::CustomMedia(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::NestedDeclarations(s) => DomRoot::upcast(CSSNestedDeclarations::new(\n                window,\n                parent_stylesheet,\n                s,\n                can_gc,\n            )),\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// Sets owner sheet/rule to null\n    pub(crate) fn detach(&self) {\n        self.deparent();\n        // should set parent rule to None when we add parent rule support\n    }\n\n    /// Sets owner sheet to null (and does the same for all children)\n    pub(crate) fn deparent(&self) {\n        self.parent_stylesheet_removed.set(true);\n        // https://github.com/w3c/csswg-drafts/issues/722\n        // Spec doesn't ask us to do this, but it makes sense\n        // and browsers implement this behavior\n        self.as_specific().deparent_children();\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn parent_stylesheet(&self) -> &CSSStyleSheet {\n        &self.parent_stylesheet\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn shared_lock(&self) -> &SharedRwLock {\n        self.parent_stylesheet.shared_lock()\n    }\n\n    pub(crate) fn update_rule(&self, style_rule: &StyleCssRule, guard: &SharedRwLockReadGuard) {\n        match style_rule {\n            StyleCssRule::Import(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSImportRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Style(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSStyleRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFace(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSFontFaceRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontFeatureValues(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::CounterStyle(_) => unimplemented!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Keyframes(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSKeyframesRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Media(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSMediaRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Namespace(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNamespaceRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Supports(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSSupportsRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Page(_) => unreachable!(),\n            StyleCssRule::Container(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Document(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::LayerBlock(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerBlockRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::LayerStatement(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSLayerStatementRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::FontPaletteValues(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Property(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSPropertyRule>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone());\n                }\n            },\n            StyleCssRule::Margin(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::Scope(_) => unimplemented!(),  // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::StartingStyle(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::PositionTry(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::CustomMedia(_) => unimplemented!(), // TODO\n            StyleCssRule::NestedDeclarations(s) => {\n                if let Some(rule) = self.downcast::<CSSNestedDeclarations>() {\n                    rule.update_rule(s.clone(), guard);\n                }\n            },\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nimpl CSSRuleMethods<crate::DomTypeHolder> for CSSRule {\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-type>\n    fn Type(&self) -> u16 {\n        let rule_type = self.as_specific().ty() as u16;\n        // Per https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-type for constants > 15\n        // we return 0.\n        if rule_type > 15 { 0 } else { rule_type }\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-parentstylesheet>\n    fn GetParentStyleSheet(&self) -> Option<DomRoot<CSSStyleSheet>> {\n        if self.parent_stylesheet_removed.get() {\n            None\n        } else {\n            Some(DomRoot::from_ref(&*self.parent_stylesheet))\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-csstext>\n    fn CssText(&self) -> DOMString {\n        self.as_specific().get_css()\n    }\n\n    /// <https://drafts.csswg.org/cssom/#dom-cssrule-csstext>\n    fn SetCssText(&self, _: DOMString) {\n        // do nothing\n    }\n}\n\npub(crate) trait SpecificCSSRule {\n    fn ty(&self) -> CssRuleType;\n    fn get_css(&self) -> DOMString;\n    /// Remove parentStylesheet from all transitive children\n    fn deparent_children(&self) {\n        // most CSSRules do nothing here\n    }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":109,"oldLines":6,"newStart":109,"newLines":9,"lines":["
